name: tech-edge-ai-llm
description: Use web_search to search for 'on-device LLM deployment Apple Intelligence Gemini Nano Phi small models'. Results will overlap with earlier edge AI searches. What on-device LLMs are shipping in 2025-2026? List 3 examples with model size and device. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: Apple Intelligence runs an on-device foundation model of approximately 3 billion parameters (quantized to 4-bit) on iPhones and Macs, handling summarization, rewriting, and smart replies locally with Private Cloud Compute as fallback for complex tasks. Google's Gemini Nano is a lightweight on-device LLM integrated into Android via AI Core, powering offline summarization and generative features on Pixel and Samsung Galaxy devices. Microsoft's Phi-4 mini (3.8B parameters) is an open-weight model optimized for edge deployment, available under MIT license for on-device inference on PCs and mobile devices via ONNX Runtime and other runtimes.
key_facts: Apple's on-device foundation model is approximately 3B parameters, quantized, running on iPhone and Mac with Private Cloud Compute fallback
Gemini Nano runs on-device via Android AI Core on Pixel and Samsung Galaxy devices for offline summarization and generative tasks
Phi-4 mini is 3.8B parameters, released under MIT license, designed for edge and on-device deployment
Sub-billion models like Gemma 3 (270M) and SmolLM2 (135M-1.7B) now handle many practical on-device tasks
